name: Miricor Enterprises Holdings Limited
summary: Miricor Enterprises Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides medical aesthetic services in Hong Kong. The company operates two medical aesthetic centers in Causeway Bay and Central District under the CosMax brand name. It offers a range of non-surgical medical aesthetic services, including energy-based procedures, injection procedures, and other solutions, as well as skin care products. The company was formerly known as Treshaa Enterprises Holdings Limited and changed its name to Miricor Enterprises Holdings Limited in August 2016. Miricor Enterprises Holdings Limited was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
